headline: Turning coffee into code since 2005.
introText: From a degree in Business Informatics at the University of Paderborn to developing enterprise solutions for the Federal Employment Agency: My passion lies in stable backends and high-performance frontends.

bootcamp.title: Intensive Bootcamp Fullstack Development
bootcamp.description: Specializing in the modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem. In addition to building scalable web applications with React and NestJS, a particular focus was placed on cloud infrastructures and the integration of forward-looking AI agents into the development process.

teccon.title: Senior Fullstack Developer
teccon.description: Conception and redevelopment of a cloud microservices architecture for innovative charging infrastructures.

ba_amm.title: Fullstack Developer (Labour Market Monitor)
ba_amm.description: Further development of an analytical tool for regional labour market structures. Implementation of interactive charts.

ba_education.title: Backend Developer (Information System for Education & Profession)
ba_education.description: Maintenance of central online platforms (ELAN, Entgeldatlas). Special focus on accessible PDF generation.

edict.title: Software Developer
edict.description: Development of highly available casino solutions and setup of declarative CI/CD pipelines.

hmmh.title: E-Commerce Software Engineer
hmmh.description: Multi-tenant e-commerce platform based on Hybris and maintenance of Intershop systems. Creation of proof-of-concepts for client acquisition.

areva.title: Java Component Expert
areva.description: Requirements analysis, data modeling in UML, and implementation of applications in Java, Struts, and Python.

isweb.title: The Web Begins
isweb.description: Creation of dynamic websites using HTML/CSS and JavaScript. Fetching data from the CMS and designing workflows.

university.title: Pioneering Tech
university.description: Research on XML documents for PDAs and cross-domain architectures within the SIRENA project.
